channel.title: NAMU Rafiq, K Valchanov, A Vuylsteke, FJ Taghavi, SB Iyer, CD Sudarshan, JA Fowles, S Anderson, P Govender, M Holmes, A White, A Mishra, L Mwaura, DP Jenkins | PlatCOVID

item.title: Regional extracorporeal membrane oxygenation retrieval service during the severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) pandemic: an interdisciplinary team approach to maintain service provision despite increased demand.
